name: mixpanel-automation
description: Automate Mixpanel tasks via Rube MCP (Composio): events, segmentation, funnels, cohorts, user profiles, JQL queries. Always search tools first for current schemas.
capabilities: Aggregate and analyze event data with configurable time ranges and units
Run segmentation queries broken down by custom properties
Query and analyze conversion funnels with drop-off metrics
List and analyze user cohorts for targeted insights
Query and update user profiles in Mixpanel
Execute custom JQL queries for advanced analytics
author: sickn33
securitySummary: This skill provides documentation and workflows for automating Mixpanel analytics via Rube MCP (Composio). The static analyzer flagged 96 potential issues, but all are false positives: backticks are markdown code formatting, cryptographic algorithm warnings are in YAML frontmatter, and hardcoded URLs point to legitimate public endpoints. This is a documentation skill with no executable code.
valueStatement: Automate Mixpanel analytics workflows including event tracking, segmentation, funnels, cohorts, and user profile management through Rube MCP integration.
limitations: Requires Rube MCP server and active Mixpanel connection
Cannot create funnels or cohorts programmatically (API read-only)
JQL is a legacy feature with potential availability changes
Date ranges and query complexity subject to Mixpanel plan limits

useCases.title: Product Analytics Dashboard
useCases.description: Build automated reports tracking key metrics like daily active users, event counts, and conversion rates over time.

useCases.title: User Cohort Analysis
useCases.description: Identify and analyze user segments based on behavior patterns, subscription status, or custom properties.

useCases.targetUser: UX researchers and conversion rate optimization specialists
useCases.title: Funnel Optimization
useCases.description: Monitor conversion funnels to identify drop-off points and optimize user journey flows.

promptTemplates.title: Get Event Count Summary
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the Mixpanel automation skill to get the total count of 'purchase' events for the last 7 days, broken down by day.

promptTemplates.title: Segment Users by Property
promptTemplates.prompt: Run a segmentation analysis on the 'sign_up' event, segmented by 'properties["country"]' for the last 30 days. Limit to top 10 segments.

promptTemplates.title: Analyze Funnel Conversion
promptTemplates.prompt: Query the 'onboarding' funnel to see conversion rates from step 1 to step 3 over the last 14 days. Show breakdown by 'properties["plan"]'.

promptTemplates.title: Batch Update User Profiles
promptTemplates.prompt: Update all users in the 'premium_trial' cohort to set 'properties["trial_status"]' to 'expired' where 'properties["trial_end_date"]' is before today.

bestPractices: Always call RUBE_SEARCH_TOOLS first to get current tool schemas before running workflows
Verify connection status shows ACTIVE before executing Mixpanel operations
Use date filters and property expressions to limit query scope and avoid timeouts
antiPatterns: Running queries without first checking Rube MCP connection status
Using incorrect date formats (must be YYYY-MM-DD)
Forgetting that event names and property names are case-sensitive in Mixpanel

faq.question: Do I need API keys to use this skill?
faq.answer: No. Rube MCP uses OAuth connection to Mixpanel. You authenticate through Mixpanel directly when setting up the connection.

faq.question: Can I create funnels through this skill?
faq.answer: No. Funnels must be created in the Mixpanel UI first. This skill can only query existing funnels.

faq.question: What is JQL in Mixpanel?
faq.answer: JQL (JavaScript Query Language) is a legacy query feature in Mixpanel that allows custom analytics queries using JavaScript-like syntax.

faq.question: How do I handle paginated results?
faq.answer: For profile queries, use the session_id from the first response for consistent pagination. Event queries use date-based pagination.

faq.question: What date format does Mixpanel require?
faq.answer: All dates must be in YYYY-MM-DD format. Other formats will cause errors.

faq.question: Can I update user profiles in bulk?
faq.answer: Yes, use MIXPANEL_PROFILE_BATCH_UPDATE to apply operations like $set, $unset, $add, or $append to multiple profiles at once.
